screenAlignments.name: Issues Workbench
gaps: Real gaps are Hebrew publishers (553) and agents (4366)

screenAlignments.name: Query Debugger
gaps: QA database has no HTTP API

criticalMisalignments: ALL /diagnostics/* API endpoints missing — 2 screens blocked
FacetCounts computed then DISCARDED before reaching ChatResponse
Per-filter confidence always null — visualization unbuildable
Binary confidence — four-band visualization misleading for place/publisher
confirmedAssumptions: Candidate objects have all fields for result cards
Evidence structure supports display (field, value, operator, source, confidence)
Agent chat API well-structured with proposals and clusters
Corrections API supports single and batch operations
Two-phase flow works via POST /chat HTTP endpoint
overallVerdict: 5 PARTIALLY_ALIGNED, 2 CONFIRMED, 2 MISALIGNED. Operator tier best supported. Diagnostics tier requires significant backend work. Biggest conceptual issue: 'issues' framing obsolete with only 121 low-conf records — real gaps are Hebrew publishers (553), agents (4366), unresearched authorities (202).
